title: Mask interworld
description:
Have you always wanted to wear an interworld mask? With this texture pack you can do it!

Now the carved pumpkin is replaced with a mask and you can put it on
body:
I made a texture pack where the pumpkin is replaced with an interworld mask, while the pumpkin itself does not change.

![Mask interworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e172ec1d64865ba0a0a89e65c25733368dbef45.png)

Do not pay attention to the fact that it writes to a newer version, works in all specified versions, maybe even lower.
